etymology.description: 之(之) (zhī, 'foot') as phonetic + 室(室) (shì, 'building') as semantic -> watch tower -> simplified from 臺
etymology.interpretation: The character 臺 initially depicted a raised platform or watchtower, combining a phonetic component representing a base ('foot') with a semantic component indicating a structure. Over time, it semantically evolved to represent platforms in general.
etymology.simplification: 台 is a simplification where parts of the character 臺 were reduced and standardized.

examples.chinese: 舞台上(舞台上)，演员表演得非常精彩(演員表演得非常精彩)。
examples.pinyin: Wǔtái shàng, yǎnyuán biǎoyǎn dé fēicháng jīngcǎi.
examples.english: On the stage, the actors performed exceptionally well.

examples.chinese: 电视台正在播新闻(電視台正在播新聞)。
examples.english: The TV station is broadcasting the news.

examples.chinese: 我们登上观景台(我們登上觀景台)，欣赏城市的全景(欣賞城市的全景)。
examples.pinyin: Wǒmen dēng shàng guānjǐngtái, xīnshǎng chéngshì de quánjǐng.
examples.english: We went up the observation deck to enjoy the panoramic view of the city.
